name: Anton Paar GmbH
h1: Anton Paar's GCC footprint in India
lede: Anton Paar runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Thane, covering gbs and sales & marketing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Anton Paar office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Anton Paar GmbH GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Anton Paar runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Thane), covering gbs and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Anton Paar's India footprint covers Gurugram and Thane, spanning gbs and sales & marketing. The centers deliver HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all one decision-makers, in one profile.
